name: @engineeringood/athena-ide
description: Athena Theia product workspace for M4.

scripts.clean: yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend clean && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-backend clean && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-product clean
scripts.build: yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend build && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-backend build && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-product build
